productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Brown Shoes
description: Style NoteA flexible outsole with a plush crush-worthy leather upper, you'll never have a style slump when you're off-duty, if you're equipped with this Benetton pair. Wear this with a tonal monochrome tee or a bomber jacket.Product DetailsSquare toed, casual slip-ons in brown with tie-up detail on the tongue and stitch detail at the seams of the toe boxLeather straps looping through metal eyelets around the anklePadded collar and tongue and an ergonomically shaped insoleUpper adhered to the outsoleTPU outsole with textured lugs and stitched detailing Material and CareSuede leatherWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in sunlightUse a leather conditioner to polish the upper
